title: PhotoUploadV1
description: Metadata sent alongside the JPEG preview when uploading a photo from the LR plugin.

lr_catalog_uuid.description: Lightroom Classic catalog UUID — stable identifier assigned by LR.

exif_snapshot.description: EXIF metadata snapshot (camera model, ISO, shutter speed, aperture, focal length, etc.).

lr_develop_settings.description: Current Lightroom Develop module settings at time of export (baseline for delta calculation).
